The [[City/Legends|town]] of '''Breeda''' was located west of [[Yeere]], the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Reytha]]. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], it and its food storage facilities were taken by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. It was subsequently was [[Reytha campaign|retaken]] by an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] strike force led by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. The Imperials razed the [[Barracks/Legends|troop center]] the Rebels had built and eliminated the small garrison.

==Behind the scenes==
Breeda appears during the Darth Vader campaign in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''. The campaign was also included in the game's [[2002]]
expansion pack, [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']].
